title: Project create + rename + share-by-name
description: Dedicated probe for a theoretical footgun flagged but never reproduced in the 20260718-211659-05yr35 campaign: `vikunja_projects`' flat args object has both `title` (the project's own name, used by create/update) and `name` (a link share's label, used by create-share) as sibling fields -- an agent could plausibly confuse the two across a create+rename+share sequence. Also exercises the share-by-name composite (create-share with a `name`) on its own, which no other shipped scenario covers (share-project-by-user creates an unnamed share).
promptTemplate: Create a project called "{{prefix}}Q4 Planning". Rename it to "{{prefix}}Q4 Planning (Final)". Then create a public, read-only share link for it named "{{prefix}}client-view".
